svg.title: Advanced Data Structures for System Design
svg.desc: Comprehensive visualization of B-Trees, Bloom Filters, LSM Trees, Merkle Trees, and Skip Lists with use cases and performance characteristics
svg.text: Advanced Data Structures for System Design
B-Trees, Bloom Filters, LSM Trees, Merkle Trees, and Skip Lists
O(log n) search/insert/delete | Self-balancing | Multiple children per node
Use Cases: Database indexes (MySQL, PostgreSQL), File systems (NTFS, ext4)
O(k) insert/lookup | Space-efficient | False positives possible, NO false negatives
Use Cases: Caching (avoid cache penetration), Distributed systems, Spell checkers
Write-optimized | Sequential I/O | Background compaction | Read amplification
Use Cases: RocksDB, Cassandra, LevelDB, HBase, Write-heavy workloads
O(log n) verification | Tamper detection | Efficient sync | Cryptographic hashes
Use Cases: Blockchain (Bitcoin), Git, Distributed systems, Data integrity
O(log n) average search/insert/delete | Probabilistic balancing | Simpler than AVL/Red-Black trees
Use Cases: Redis Sorted Sets, Database indexes, In-memory ordered collections
